ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for whom the project is being developed */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager responsible for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feature */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the feature */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature the test case belongs to */,
  "steps" TEXT /* Detailed steps to execute the test */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the test */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., Not Tested, Passed, Failed) */,
  "jira_ticket" TEXT /* JIRA ticket number associated with the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test case */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last updated */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of the test case (e.g., functional, performance, security) */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level of the test case */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required to execute the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_jira_ticket FOREIGN KEY ("jira_ticket") REFERENCES jira_tickets ("jira_ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jira_tickets" (
  "jira_ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each JIRA ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the JIRA ticket */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the JIRA ticket */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the JIRA ticket was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the JIRA ticket was last updated */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the JIRA ticket */,
  "reporter" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the JIRA ticket */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the JIRA ticket was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the JIRA ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jira_ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jira_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jira_tickets_reporter FOREIGN KEY ("reporter") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, project manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the test */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test execution (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Testing environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the test execution */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case where the defect was found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the defect */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was last updated */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the defect */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the defect */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the defect */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the defect was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_jira_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defect */,
  "jira_ticket_id" TEXT /* JIRA ticket number associated with the defect */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the mapping */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_jira_mapping_defect_id FOREIGN KEY ("defect_id") REFERENCES defects ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_jira_mapping_jira_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("jira_ticket_id") REFERENCES jira_tickets ("jira_ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_jira_mapping_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_jira_mapping_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a test case */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the testing progress and results */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the testing efforts */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
